name: BSES BRPL Open Tenders
usage: Use for BSES-specific procurement categories, NIT references and demand signals.

name: BSES BRPL Tender Center
usage: Use for vendor registration and historical tender result navigation.

name: Government e-Marketplace
usage: Use for public vendor discovery, catalogue price benchmarks and seller presence checks.

name: Central Public Procurement Portal

name: World Bank Commodity Markets Pink Sheet
usage: Use as neutral macro commodity benchmark and market commentary source.

name: London Metal Exchange Official Prices
usage: Use as a global reference for metal-indexed contract clauses.

name: Multi Commodity Exchange of India
usage: Use for Indian market context and commodity movements.

name: GST e-Invoice Portal
usage: Use to align invoice validation flow with e-invoice IRN and QR concepts.
